ddls:
CREATE TABLE "presidents" (
  "president_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each president */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the president */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the president's party affiliation */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Date the president's term started */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* Date the president's term ended */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the president */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the president */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the president */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vice_presidents" (
  "vice_president_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vice-president */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vice-president */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vice-president's party affiliation */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Date the vice-president's term started */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* Date the vice-president's term ended */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the vice-president */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the vice-president */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the vice-president */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the vice-president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vice_president_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vice_presidents_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabinet_members" (
  "cabinet_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabinet member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cabinet member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the cabinet member */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cabinet member's party affiliation */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Date the cabinet member's term started */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* Date the cabinet member's term ended */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the cabinet member */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the cabinet member */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the cabinet member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the cabinet member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabinet_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cabinet_members_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "president_vice_president" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "vice_president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vice-president */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Date the relationship started */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "president_cabinet" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "cabinet_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cabinet member */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Date the relationship started */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* Date the relationship ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "policy_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the policy (e.g. economic, social, foreign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "decision_name" TEXT /* Name of the decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the decision */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decisions_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "multimedia" (
  "multimedia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multimedia item */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video, audio) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media item */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media item was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multimedia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_multimedia_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, historian, student) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the database was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the database was accessed */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., query, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary amount */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the salary was paid */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the salary data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the election (e.g., won, lost) */,
  "turnout" INTEGER /* Voter turnout for the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "quote" TEXT /* Text of the quote */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the quote */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of the quote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presidential_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "order_name" TEXT /* Name of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was issued */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presidential_orders_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speeches" (
  "speech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speech */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "speech_name" TEXT /* Name of the speech */,
  "speech_date" TEXT /* Date the speech was delivered */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the speech was delivered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speeches_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treaties" (
  "treaty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treaty */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "treaty_name" TEXT /* Name of the treaty */,
  "treaty_date" TEXT /* Date the treaty was signed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country with which the treaty was signed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treaty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treaties_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislation" (
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislation */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "legislation_name" TEXT /* Name of the legislation */,
  "legislation_date" TEXT /* Date the legislation was signed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legislation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislation_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the president */,
  "appointment_name" TEXT /* Name of the appointee */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date the appointment was made */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position to which the appointee was appointed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES presidents ("president_id")
)
